CustomField.formula: if(NATT_Core__c==true || NATT_ItemPriceGroup__c =='123',true,if((NATT_Sales_Code__c=='S01' || NATT_Sales_Code__c=='SM1' || NATT_Sales_Code__c=='SB1'),if (ISPICKVAL( NAOCAP_Signal_Code_ANA__c, "NLO"),if (ISPICKVAL( NAOCAP_Stocking_Type_UTC_ANA__c,"O"),true,false),ISPICKVAL( NAOCAP_Signal_Code_ANA__c, "S2") || ISPICKVAL( NAOCAP_Signal_Code_ANA__c, "PRC") || ISPICKVAL( NAOCAP_Signal_Code_ANA__c, "FIN") || ISPICKVAL( NAOCAP_Signal_Code_ANA__c, "BY2")),true))
CustomField.label: NAOCAP Not Orderable ANA
